# geox.arif-fazil.com

## Purpose
The Earth Intelligence Surface (Φ) for the arifOS constellation. Focuses on geospatial intelligence, subsurface interpretation, and terrain hazard audit with a specific focus on Southeast Asian basins.

## Heritage
Built on 13+ years of exploration geoscience discipline within Southeast Asian energy margins (Petronas context).

## Canonical Pages
- /apps: Governed workspaces (Basin Explorer, Risk Console, Seismic Vision).
- /theory: The Theory of Anomalous Contrast (ToAC).
- /docs: Geospatial data schemas and operational manuals.
- /map: Regional geospatial orientation.

## Governance
Operates under arifOS constitutional floors F2 (Truth), F8 (Grounding), and F13 (Sovereignty). High-risk interpretative branches are hold-gated for human review.
